title: Lies, Inc.
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: An expanded version of Dick's 1966 novel The Unteleported Man, incorporating hallucinatory material removed from the original publication. The novel concerns teleportation to a colony planet and a conspiracy to conceal the truth about conditions there. Published posthumously in 1984. Knopf Doubleday 2007 EPUB edition.
